introSection: Wild Buffalo is a wooden roller coaster located at La Mer de Sable in Ermenonville, Hauts-de-France, France.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Work started on the coaster in July 2024.

The coaster's name was announced as Wild Buffalo on 5 October 2024.

Great Coasters International was on site from 14 October 2024 through 24 April 2025.

It opened on 26 April 2025.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The coaster was manufactured by Great Coasters International, with design and engineering work done by Skyline Design, a frequent collaborator.

fullText:
Wild Buffalo is a wooden roller coaster located at La Mer de Sable in Ermenonville, Hauts-de-France, France.

Work started on the coaster in July 2024.

The coaster's name was announced as Wild Buffalo on 5 October 2024.

Great Coasters International was on site from 14 October 2024 through 24 April 2025.

It opened on 26 April 2025.

The coaster was manufactured by Great Coasters International, with design and engineering work done by Skyline Design, a frequent collaborator.
